svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="ChatGPT"> <diagram id="receive-path" name="Receive Path"> <mxGraphModel dx="1983" dy="1065" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1600" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontSize=24;fontStyle=1;" value="Receive Path" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="380" x="610" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ethernet" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E3F2FD;strokeColor=#1565C0;fontSize=17;" value="<b>Ethernet Driver</b><br/>Received Ethernet frame" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="600" x="500" y="85" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="input" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=17;" value="<b>macsec_input()</b><br/>All received Ethernet frames enter here" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="660" x="470" y="215" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="classify" parent="1" style="rhombus;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFFDE7;strokeColor=#F9A825;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;" value="Frame type?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="150" width="300" x="650" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mka" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#EF6C00;fontSize=15;" value="<b>MKA / EAPOL</b><br/><br/>Parse MKPDU<br/>Update peers<br/>Process keys and state" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="360" x="100" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="macsec" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F1F8E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=15;" value="<b>Protected MACsec Frame</b><br/><br/>Check SecTAG and PN<br/>Verify ICV<br/>Decrypt payload" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="360" x="620" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plain" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=15;" value="<b>Other Ethernet Frame</b><br/><br/>Frame is not protected by MACsec" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="180" width="360" x="1140" y="590" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="mka-drop" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FBE9E7;strokeColor=#C62828;fontSize=15;" value="<b>Consumed internally</b><br/>pass_to_stack = false" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="300" x="130" y="835" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="macsec-pass" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#2E7D32;fontSize=15;" value="<b>Plain Ethernet Frame</b><br/>pass_to_stack = true" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="300" x="650" y="835" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="plain-pass" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F5F5F5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=15;" value="<b>Original Ethernet Frame</b><br/>pass_to_stack depends on policy" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="85" width="300" x="1170" y="835" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="stack" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#EDE7F6;strokeColor=#5E35B1;fontSize=17;" value="<b>Upper Network Stack / Application</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="600" x="500" y="980" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF8E1;strokeColor=#F9A825;dashed=1;fontSize=13;" value="MKA frames are handled by the stack and never forwarded to the upper network stack." vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="75" width="350" x="85" y="960" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ethernet" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="input"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge2" edge="1" parent="1" source="input" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="classify"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-mka" edge="1" parent="1" source="classify" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="mka" value="MKA / EAPOL"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-macsec" edge="1" parent="1" source="classify" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="macsec" value="MACsec"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-plain" edge="1" parent="1" source="classify" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="plain" value="Other"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-mka-drop" edge="1" parent="1" source="mka" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="mka-drop"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-macsec-pass" edge="1" parent="1" source="macsec" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="macsec-pass"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-plain-pass" edge="1" parent="1" source="plain" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="plain-pass"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-to-stack1" edge="1" parent="1" source="macsec-pass" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;" target="stack"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="edge-to-stack2" edge="1" parent="1" source="plain-pass" style="endArrow=block;endFill=1;html=1;strokeWidth=2;dashed=1;" target="stack"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
